title: Blood-Soaked Rose
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain 1 at the start of each turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Grants 1 energy per turn. Adds 1 Enthralled (curse) card to your deck upon pickup.
